trade.summary: The Stati Uniti is Italia's largest single-country export market outside the EU. Italia runs a significant trade surplus with the Stati Uniti. Italia exports machinery, pharmaceuticals, luxury goods, food and wine, and vehicles; the Stati Uniti exports aircraft, energy, pharmaceuticals, and technology. Italian goods have strong brand recognition in American consumer markets. Stati Uniti tariff threats under the Trump administration in 2025 created concerns for Italia's export-dependent sectors.
disputes: Stati Uniti tariff threats on EU goods (2025)

diplomatic.summary: Italia is a close Stati Uniti ally within NATO and the G7. The Meloni government, despite its right-wing populist orientation, has maintained a firmly pro-Western and pro-Stati Uniti stance, distancing itself from the pro-Russia and anti-NATO postures of some European far-right parties. Stati Uniti-Italia relations are particularly close under the Trump administration due to ideological affinity between Meloni and Trump. Italia hosted a G7 summit in 2024 under Meloni's presidency.
recent_incidents: Stati Uniti-Italia cooperation on G7 2024 summit
Trade tensions over Stati Uniti tariff proposals 2025

military.summary: Italia is a key NATO ally and hosts major Stati Uniti military bases (Aviano, Sigonella, Vicenza, and others). Italia is one of the largest Stati Uniti military presence locations in Europe. Italia participates in F-35 program, Joint Strike Fighter production, and various NATO operations. Stati Uniti-Italia military cooperation is deep and extensive. Italia contributes to Stati Uniti-led coalitions globally.

financial.summary: Major bilateral investment. Stati Uniti companies (tech, pharma, consumer goods) have substantial Italian operations. Italian luxury conglomerates (Stellantis, Luxottica/EssilorLuxottica, Prada, Ferrari) are listed in New York or have major Stati Uniti market presence. Wall Street investment in Italian sovereign debt is significant. Stati Uniti private equity is active in Italian mid-market M&A.

energy.summary: The Stati Uniti has become Italia's leading LNG supplier since Russia's invasion of Ucraina prompted Italian energy diversification. Stati Uniti LNG terminals now supply a significant portion of Italia's gas imports. ENI and major Stati Uniti energy companies have commercial partnerships globally.

scientific.summary: Extremely strong scientific partnership. Italian and American researchers collaborate across all major fields. NASA and the Italian Space Agency (ASI) have deep cooperation including on the International Space Station. Major Stati Uniti universities have Italian faculty and Italian students. Joint research through NSF-CNR agreements is extensive.
